title: nematanthus tessmannii
intro: Nematanthus tessmannii, also known as Gold Dust Plant, is a type of flowering succulent native to South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nematanthus tessmannii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Nematanthus tessmannii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
